category_sources: source_facts.description says it streams CLI output and publishes it to supported platforms; official ProjectDiscovery docs describe Notify as publishing tool output to multiple locations.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is notify; official ProjectDiscovery docs and GitHub repository use Notify/notify.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage points to official ProjectDiscovery documentation; official docs link to the GitHub repository.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated; repo intentionally returned as null per instructions.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official ProjectDiscovery docs identify CLI output notifications with Slack, Discord, Telegram, email, Teams, Google Chat, and custom webhooks.
